criteria.name: Uses class diagram syntax
criteria.description: Returns Mermaid classDiagram syntax rather than switching diagram types.

criteria.name: Normalizes multiplicity syntax
criteria.description: Uses quoted relationship cardinality/label syntax for portability, especially replacing the bare `many` token with an explicit quoted cardinality.

criteria.name: Preserves classes and details
criteria.description: Keeps Skill, MermaidSkill, ReferenceFile, and EvalScenario with the requested concise attributes.

criteria.name: Preserves intended relationships
criteria.description: Keeps MermaidSkill inheriting from Skill, Skill loading many ReferenceFiles, and EvalScenario testing exactly one Skill.

criteria.name: Explains smallest repair
criteria.description: Gives one concise sentence explaining the minimal syntax repair without overclaiming validation.
